name: Twitch (Beta)
description: One of the biggest livestreaming platforms, owned by Amazon.
author: FUTO

authentication.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10; K) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/125.0.6422.113 Mobile Safari/537.36

settings.name: Include channel panel links
settings.description: Merge links from the channel's About panels (may include sponsored / affiliate links).

settings.name: Verbose Notifications
settings.description: Show toast notifications for plugin trace messages and failed requests.

settings.name: Livestream Ads (Experimental)
settings.description: Filter Twitch-inserted commercial breaks from livestreams.

settings.name: Use Legacy HLS URL
settings.description: Fall back to the pre-v2 usher endpoint with sparse query parameters.

settings.name: Browser Impersonation (Experimental)
settings.description: Route requests through a browser-impersonating HTTP client. Enable if Twitch starts blocking the plugin.

settings.name: Impersonate API Requests
settings.description: Applies to GraphQL queries and the integrity token endpoint.

settings.name: Impersonate Media Requests
settings.description: Applies to HLS playlist and segment fetches.

32: Fix: Detect subscriber-only VODs and show proper error instead of broken playback;
31: Improvement: Remove dead code and improve performance;
Improvement: Optimize VOD loading from channel pages;
28: Improvement: Add 1440p stream support for logged-in users in supported regions;
27: Improvement: Switch to CBR bitrate to resolve automatic resolution drops
25: Fix: solve playback errors in some clips;
